meaning: n.奥尔德尼乳牛(原产于英国海峡群岛的奥尔德尼岛)
examples: Dr Bahaj has done most work on the Alderney site, where there are powerful currents.
To select this branch, head over to the green dollar sign in Alderney.
Paul Hillion was in the midst of a flock of swooping, plunge-diving gannets off the coast of Alderney in the Channel Islands when he took this photo.
Alderney States has registered its disapproval of the way it has been treated by Guernsey.
The history of Alderney Harbour is depicted in Guernsey Post's latest set of stamps.
